info.title: NIH Clinical Table Search Service - NCBI Genes API
info.description: Search for human gene information from NCBI's Gene dataset. The data is sourced from NCBI Gene (gene_info.gz) and includes only human genes. This is a public API provided by the National Library of Medicine and requires no authentication.

get.description: Search for human gene records from NCBI's Gene dataset. Supports partial word matching, field filtering, pagination, and Elasticsearch query syntax for advanced filtering.

parameters.name: terms
parameters.description: The search string (e.g., a partial word) for which to find matches. Multiple terms are combined with implicit AND logic.

parameters.name: maxList
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. If left empty the server returns up to 500 results.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the first result to return. The sum of offset and count is capped at 7500.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Additional query string using Elasticsearch query syntax for filtering results. Supports wildcards and field-specific searches.

parameters.name: df
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the display strings (element [3] of the response array).

parameters.name: sf
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to search against. Defaults to all searchable fields when omitted.

parameters.name: cf
parameters.description: The field whose values are returned as the code list (element [1] of the response array).

parameters.name: ef
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of extra fields to return in the extra data hash (element [2] of the response). Supports field:alias syntax to rename fields in the output.

200.description: Successful search response. Returns a JSON array with five elements: total count, code array, extra data object, display string arrays, and code system arrays.

SearchResponse.description: A five-element tuple: [totalCount, codes, extraData, displayStrings, codeSystems].

TotalCount.description: Total number of results matching the query, capped at 10000.

CodeArray.description: Array of code values from the field specified by the cf parameter (default: GeneID).

ExtraDataHash.description: Hash/object of extra field data as requested by the ef parameter. Keys are field names (or aliases) and values are arrays of field values per result.

DisplayStringsArray.description: Array of display string arrays, one per result. Each inner array contains the values of the fields specified by the df parameter.

DisplayStringRow.description: An array of field values for a single result, corresponding to the fields in the df parameter.

CodeSystemsArray.description: Array of code system arrays, one per result. Each inner array contains the code system identifier(s) for that result.

CodeSystemRow.description: Code system identifier(s) for a single result.

GeneRecord.description: Available fields in the NCBI Genes dataset that can be used with df, sf, cf, and ef parameters.

type_of_gene.description: Gene type classification (e.g., protein-coding, pseudo, ncRNA)

Other_designations.description: Other known designations for the gene

tags.name: Genes
tags.description: Human gene search operations using NCBI Gene data
